title: Already before the world was created, god chose those individuals whom he would in time convert through the gospel and preserve in the faith to eternal life
At the beginning of time god created heaven and earth and all creatures
Baptism is a holy act
Believers pray
Faith in jesus christ is living and active
Faith is a repentant sinner’s acceptance of jesus christ as his only savior and full trust in his worthiness for forgiveness of sins and salvation
God judged all sinners righteous in his sight when jesus christ died on the cross for us
God the father is one of the three persons who are the triune god
God wrote his law in people’s hearts at creation
Holy communion is a holy act instituted by christ
Human life is the gift of a gracious god
Jesus christ is the savior of everyone
Jesus, who is both god and man,humbled himself by becoming a man and dying on the cross
Many of god’s angels sinned and became powerful evil spirits, called demons
Marriage is the union of one man and one woman
Men and women are a special creation of god
Not only the church, but also all governmental authority, is instituted by god
Repentance is an acknowledgment of sin and sincere regret for it
The bible and lutherans teach the gospel
The bible is the true word of god
The first man and woman lost the image of god when they gave in to the temptation of satan and disobeyed god’s command
The holy spirit causes the heart to trust in jesus as its savior
The holy spirit is true god equal to god the father and god the son
The religious education of children is the primary duty of parents and especially of the fathers
There is one holy, christian church
There is only one true god
To be in heaven is to be in the presence of god
True unity of the church is evident when christians agree in their confession to the doctrine revealed in scripture
